description: This test file contains unit tests for functions 'extractNameAndCurrentRole' and 'extractBestNameAndRoleFromDocuments' in 'nameRoleExtraction' module. It verifies the extraction of employee names and roles from different document types such as performance reviews, job descriptions, and resumes.

methods.name: extractNameAndCurrentRole
methods.description: Extracts an employee's name and role from a single document, typically a performance review or job description.

methods.name: extractBestNameAndRoleFromDocuments
methods.description: Determines the best candidate name and role from a list of documents, prioritizing resume data over job descriptions and extracting relevant information.
